articles.summary: Hims may have a chance to grow peptides business as a potential revenue driver, with FDA review in 2026 shaping the opportunity.

articles.title: Airline CEOs urged by lawmaker to lower fares if fuel prices come down

articles.summary: SUVs may have taken over America, but high prices and oversaturation are pushing some customers — and automakers — back to sedans.

articles.title: Eli Lilly agrees to acquire cancer drug maker Kelonia in deal worth up to $7 billion
